label: Q2 News from social media - fun
question: That’s interesting. When you get news, do you prefer using social media or official news websites? Why?

statement_reason.full: I prefer getting news from social media because it is more fun and engaging.

before_example.full: In the past, when I used official news websites, the information was usually very long and boring. I had to read long articles, and I did not really enjoy reading them.

after_example.full: But now, I use social media to check the news. The news clips are usually short, and I can see a variety of opinions. Some of them are really entertaining. People also leave all kinds of funny comments under the clips, so I have more fun watching and reading the news.
